query: Magnesium glycinate sleep supplement for women 35+

parsed.executive_summary: Magnesium glycinate occupies a high-trust, science-backed position in the booming women's sleep category, with strong search momentum among health-conscious women 35+ who distrust pharma sleep aids. The buyer is a wellness-literate, subscription-friendly consumer already spending on hormonal and stress support supplements.
parsed.build_explanation: Magnesium glycinate has broad consumer awareness, clinically credible sleep and anxiety mechanisms, and a clean safety profile that invites repeat purchase and high LTV. The 35+ women's niche is underserved by dedicated branding despite being the heaviest supplement-buying demographic.

demand.notes: Google Trends shows sustained YoY growth for 'magnesium glycinate' and 'magnesium for sleep' with women 35–54 as top searcher cohort.

competition.notes: Nested Naturals, Moon Juice, and Nature Made dominate shelf space, leaving a gap for a women-35+-specific brand narrative.

virality.notes: Sleep transformation content and 'magnesium changed my life' UGC are already viral formats on TikTok with tens of millions of views.

subscription.notes: Daily-use protocol with noticeable sleep regression on stopping creates strong habitual repurchase and subscription stickiness.

manufacturing.notes: Magnesium glycinate is widely available, shelf-stable, and requires no special handling or complex formulation steps.

defensibility.notes: Ingredient is commoditized so defensibility must come from brand story, community, and clinical credibility stacking rather than formula novelty.

biggest_competitor.name: Moon Juice Magnesi-Om
biggest_competitor.gap: Positioned gender-neutral and spiritually aesthetic, with no clinical messaging or life-stage specificity for perimenopausal women 35+.

market_gaps: No leading brand explicitly addresses perimenopause-adjacent sleep disruption in messaging
Most SKUs ignore cortisol and estrogen fluctuation context that drives sleep loss in this cohort
Clinical dosing (300–400mg elemental) is inconsistently delivered; many brands underdose
Subscription bundles pairing magnesium with complementary sleep actives are absent at the premium tier
Community-driven content around women's sleep identity ('I finally sleep like myself again') is unclaimed
brand_opportunities: Build a hormone-aware sleep brand that speaks directly to the 35–50 life stage with credible clinical language
Lead with a 30-night protocol framing to drive trial-to-subscription conversion and results accountability
Partner with OB-GYNs, sleep coaches, and women's health podcasts for earned authority and affiliate reach
Create a 'Sleep Snapshot' quiz funnel that personalizes dosing and upsells into a broader women's wellness stack
Leverage before/after sleep quality content (Oura Ring data, sleep diary screenshots) as core UGC engine

frustrations: I wake up at 3am for no reason and can't fall back asleep no matter what I try
Every sleep supplement I've tried either doesn't work or makes me feel groggy the next morning
desires: I want to fall asleep naturally and wake up feeling like myself again
I want something that actually works without messing with my hormones or becoming a dependency
fears: I'm scared this is just the beginning of years of bad sleep as I get older
I don't want to become reliant on a pill just to get a normal night of rest

ad_phrases.they_say: I just don't sleep well anymore
ad_phrases.use_in_copy: Your sleep didn't break. Your magnesium levels did.
Most sleep supplements skip the mineral your body is actually missing.

product_recommendation.dosing: 2 capsules/day — taken 30–60 minutes before bed with water, away from calcium

formula.role: Primary sleep and relaxation support via GABA modulation and muscle relaxation
Reduces sleep-onset anxiety and promotes alpha-wave calm without sedation
Cortisol modulation supporting nighttime stress reduction and sleep quality
Cofactor for magnesium absorption and serotonin-to-melatonin conversion

avoid: Melatonin — triggers hormone-dependency concerns in the 35+ audience and regulatory complexity at higher doses
Magnesium oxide — poor bioavailability (~4%) undermines clinical credibility and product efficacy perception

financial_projections.path_to_10m: Scale through women's health podcast sponsorships and TikTok sleep content creators in months 1–12, convert 30% of buyers to subscription by month 6, then layer in a 2-SKU bundle (sleep + magnesium daily) to raise average order value past $70.
